title: Building Forms around Inventory
excerpt:

posts.author: Yaraki (Yoshi Araki)
posts.cookedHtml:
My company is creating an inventory of gifting/swag items that our sales team can select from and send to their clients or bring with them on sales calls.
I am trying to create a request form where, whatever we have in the inventory board “mirrors” into the request form (so we’re not manually adding and removing items based on our inventory), our sales team can select from the list of items, that will then automate an alert to the proper channels for approval and then ultimately fulfilled my the admin assigned.
And finally the admin can hit a button of some sort, to automatically deduct the items from the inventory board after the request is fulfilled.
Is any of this possible?

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it can be done either on Monday or with other tools connected to Monday as well.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m unable to share my calendar here, please send me an email so we can set a call to go more in details about your project andres@connex.digital

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Yaraki and thanks for posting to the monday.com community forums!

This project is very similar to one CarbonWeb has done for a few of our clients. We have done this in a few different ways and I would love to connect with you discuss how we can get this done for you. Our team takes a component-by-component approach to ensure your monday.com environment is streamlined and flexible throughout the project.

If you would like to connect and discuss please grab some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get this setup!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Yaraki !

My team and I have a complete solution for your situation! We have created a system that solves the following pain points such as:
Loaned Inventory

  • Future Projections of Shipped Inventory

  • Quantities of Inventory (Automatic calculations when inventory is shipped)

  • Live Updates of Inventory Locations

  • Accountability for Responsible Parties involved with Inventory

  • History of items being shipped to certain Clients and Locations.

I would be more than happy to demo this for you in a 30-minute meeting for free! Please choose a date using my Calendly link here.

Thank you!
